name: Discount Calculator
description: Calculate discounted price and savings based on an original price and discount percentage.
formulaDescription: Calculates how much you save and how much you pay after applying the discount.

example.explanation: A 15% discount on ₹1000 saves ₹150 and you pay ₹850.

faqs.question: What if the discount percentage is 0?
faqs.answer: You pay the full original price and savings are zero.
